parameters.subject: =Friendly reminder: Invoice {{$json.invoice_number}} - ${{$json.balance_due}}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{$json.client_name}},

We hope you're doing well! This is a friendly reminder that invoice {{$json.invoice_number}} for ${{$json.balance_due}} was due on {{$json.due_date}} ({{$json.days_past_due}} days ago).

Please process payment at your earliest convenience.

Thank you,
{{$env.SENDER_NAME}}

parameters.subject: =Payment overdue {{$json.days_past_due}} days: Invoice {{$json.invoice_number}} - ${{$json.balance_due}}
parameters.text:
=Dear {{$json.client_name}},

Your invoice {{$json.invoice_number}} for ${{$json.balance_due}} is now {{$json.days_past_due}} days past due.

Please remit payment within 5 business days or contact us to discuss payment arrangements.

If payment has already been sent, please disregard this notice.

Thank you,
{{$env.SENDER_NAME}}
